# zenpng public API — supported surface (default features)
# (regenerated on every `cargo test` by zenutils-apidoc; ZEN_API_DOC=check verifies, =off skips).
# Encodings: crate-name prefix stripped; auto traits collapse to a
# count + exceptions; trait impls collapse to one roster line per
# type (method signatures live at the trait definition); blanket
# impls omitted; re-export duplicates annotated `[also: path]`.
# DO NOT EDIT BY HAND — commit regenerated changes with the code.
#
# files: zenpng.txt 383 lines (supported surface) | zenpng.features.txt 21 added (features: avx512,cms,imagequant,joint,quantette,quantize,unchecked,zencodec,zopfli) | zenpng.internal.txt 80 lines (111 hidden + 0 excluded-feature)

## summary
#
#   pub modules                                 3
#   pub types (struct/enum/trait/alias)        45
#   pub consts/statics                          9
#   free functions                             21
#   inherent methods                           64
#   struct fields                             138
#   enum variants                              54
#   trait roster entries (type × trait)       142
#   auto-trait-complete types                  37
#   auto-trait exceptions                       6
#
# per-module pub lines:
#   (root)                          274
#   detect                           41
#   sweep                            19

## items (334 lines)

pub trait Quantizer: core::marker::Send + core::marker::Sync
pub fn Quantizer::name(&self) -> &str
pub fn Quantizer::quantize_multi_frame(&self, &[&[[u8; 4]]], usize, usize) -> core::result::Result<MultiFrameOutput, PngError>
pub fn Quantizer::quantize_rgba(&self, &[[u8; 4]], usize, usize) -> core::result::Result<QuantizeOutput, PngError>

PngEncoderConfig: Clone, Debug, Default, zencodec::traits::encoding::EncoderConfig

## auto traits

37 types implement all of: Freeze, RefUnwindSafe, Send, Sync, Unpin, UnwindSafe
ApngEncodeParams<'a>: !RefUnwindSafe !UnwindSafe
PngAnimationFrameDecoder: !RefUnwindSafe !UnwindSafe
